concentration.note: Largest visible value; verify sold comps before treating as cash.
Strong thesis fit and co-founder identity piece.
Likely trade/sell candidate into stronger characters.

projectionBands.assumption: Thin comps, shipping friction, and modern PSA/CGC slabs clear below app values.
Core Luffy/Zoro/Nami/Roger/Sabo cards hold value and a few bids are won under cap.
OP14/EB04 Warlords attention, August 2026 anniversary demand, and strong local/liquid exits support premiums.

rules: Sell or trade off-thesis cards before adding weak low-grade slabs.
Prefer PSA 10 or CGC 10 Pristine on modern non-trophy cards unless price is clearly low.
Do not chase duplicate PSA 9 Luffy cards without fresh sold comps.
Keep bids in one Courtyard shipment only when the incremental card is still on thesis.
Treat projections as scenario planning, not guaranteed profit.
nextReviewTriggers: Phygitals shipment arrives and cert images are visible.
Courtyard offers expire or are accepted.
OP14/EB04 local stock and comps stabilize.
Premium Bandai / local channels open English 3rd Anniversary Set allocation.
Collectr values move more than 20 percent from current snapshot.
